query:
SELECT source, COUNT(*) AS n, MIN(createdAt) AS earliest, MAX(createdAt) AS latest
FROM moodSignals
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY n DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ZHgHA7566FjgCYD.51c539e8d5ba --database mm3swGictQLHDWKPJCGiHp --execute SELECT source, COUNT(*) AS n, MIN(createdAt) AS earliest, MAX(createdAt) AS latest
FROM moodSignals
